messages.content:
Create a scam-baiting response to the following email, to lure the scammer into a false sense of security by posing as a potential victim.


My dear,

My dearly loved friend, I am writing to you in regards to my motive to establish a charity firm in your country. I have taken this decision because of my ill health. I may not survive the sickness because my doctor has said it. He said that I might not survive the surgery that will be performed on me. I want to invest some of ($7,700,000 USD) in charity work. My name is Dr.Norah Easa Saleh, 71 years old from Wales, residing in London. My husband, late Easa Saleh Al Gurg, Who passed away 31 March 2022 He was a former United Arab Emirates ambassador to the United Kingdom and retired as an oil merchant and businessman. We were married for more than  17years out of 18years he spent in the UK as ambassador without a child. I have no one to inherit the fund. I am entrusting the money in your hands to use and work for humanity.

I want to use this fund to enhance the life of the orphans and the less privileged in your country. Also, I want the poor people to benefit from the money. I do not want to give money to an existing organization, because it could be used selfishly and their organization, only. I want to provide free education and housing for poor people. I'll be happy to do it now, before I die. My health is deteriorating day by day. I do not want the bank to get my money when I die.

Also I have  to let you know in case there are any expenses you make on this transaction, as soon as the funds transfer into your account, you will  set aside  20% of the whole funds to cover your time and any expenses you may have incurred  and the rest will go on the project.

For the preparation of legal documents to my lawyer, please send your personal details, your full name and contact / address, age, sex, marital status, occupation, contact phone number, scan copy of your international passport or driver's license or Any ID Card. I will send them to my lawyer, he will use it to prepare power of attorney documents, which he must submit to the bank to initiate a lawsuit and a copy sent to you too. Please do not convert the entire collection of personal use. I want you to promise me that you will work as I have said here. I look forward to your data. And make sure you maintain the confidentiality of you on this matter until the money has consistently been released to your bank account. I do not want my husband's relatives to know about it. They are not pleasant to me and my marriage with My husband, the late Easa Saleh Al Gurg. They are too extravagant. Please adhere strictly to my instructions.

I appreciate your willingness to help those in need. wait your message.

Dr.Norah Easa Saleh.

Dear Dr. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

I was deeply touched upon receiving your heartfelt message and learning about your precarious health situation and noble intentions. It's rare to come across individuals who, even in their darkest hours, think about lighting up the lives of others. Your generosity and kindness have moved me profoundly, and I feel honored that you've considered me capable of undertaking such a significant responsibility.

Firstly, let me express my deepest sympathies for the loss of your husband, late Easa Saleh Al Gurg. It is clear he was a man of great distinction and honor, and his passing must have been a great loss to not only you but many whose lives he touched. It's admirable that you wish to continue a legacy of giving and charity in his name.

Regarding your proposal to establish a charity firm in my country dedicated to supporting orphans and the less privileged, I want you to know that I am fully on board with your vision. The idea of providing free education, housing, and support to those in need resonates deeply with me. Having seen firsthand the struggles of the less fortunate in my community, your plan feels like a beacon of hope to make a substantial difference.

As requested, I'm fully prepared to forward my personal details for the preparation of legal documents. However, before proceeding, I find it paramount to address a mutual understanding and trust that must be established between us. Given the significant nature of this venture and the amount involved, it would be prudent to take steps that assure both of us of the sincerity and security in our dealings.

Would it be possible to arrange a video call or a meeting with your lawyer? This would provide a platform to discuss the project in greater detail and establish a personal connection, which I believe is critical for a task that requires such dedication and trust. Additionally, this would help in clarifying any doubts and formulating a robust plan of action before proceeding with the transfer of sensitive information and the substantial funds. Moreover, understanding the specifics of the legal process and the mechanisms you envision for the charity's establishment would be beneficial.

Also, regarding the financial aspects and ensuring your funds are utilized solely as per your wishes, could you provide more details on how you envision the management and oversight of the charity's operations once established? This will aid in laying a solid groundwork to ensure the fidelity of your vision and the efficient use of the funds.

I assure you of my commitment to confidentiality and to adhering strictly to your instructions. Your wish to keep this matter private, particularly from relatives who you feel might not respect your husband's legacy and your wishes, is completely understandable and will be honored.

Please, let me know your thoughts on the suggestions regarding our next steps. I am ready and willing to embark on this journey with you, to realize a vision that carries such a profound and meaningful impact.

Looking forward to hearing from you soon.

Warmest regards,

[Your Name]

Create a scam-baiting response to the most recent email, to keep the scammer in a false sense of security by posing as a potential victim.

Email #1, from Cameron (scam-baiter):

Dear <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON> and Mr. Charles Sipes,

I hope this email finds you both well. I would like to start by expressing my gratitude for the clear instructions and proactive steps you have both taken to facilitate this crucial phase of our collaboration. It’s heartening to see such commendable levels of dedication and transparency, which reinforce my confidence in this process.

Before proceeding with the transaction to Mr. Charles Franklin Sipes’ account, I have carefully considered the details provided and have taken preparatory steps to ensure a smooth and secure transfer. Additionally, I believe it is prudent to address a few points that will further solidify my understanding and commitment to our shared goals:

1. Confirmation of Receipt: The brief message from Charles to Mary was reassuring. However, for added transparency and for my records, could Mr. Sipes directly confirm receipt of the initial payment and its forwarding to the lawyer? This direct communication would be invaluable for maintaining a comprehensive record of all transactions.

2. Legal Documentation: Understanding the critical role that the legal documentation plays in this process, could you provide a brief overview or copies of the documents that are being procured with the funds? This would help me grasp the scope of the legal groundwork being laid and the steps remaining until the fund’s release.

3. Timeline for Document Preparation: It would be beneficial to have an estimated timeline for when the necessary documents are expected to be ready and sent for my review. This will assist in planning and ensuring that all parties are aligned in terms of expectations and next steps.

4. Verification of Account Details: Due to the increasing prevalence of online fraud, my bank has advised verifying the account details provided for the wire transfer. Would it be possible for Mr. Sipes to confirm that the bank account information remains accurate and has not been subjected to any recent changes?

5. Secure Transmission of Sensitive Information: Lastly, as we progress, there may be a need to exchange more sensitive information. Could we consider setting up a secure means of communication, such as encrypted emails, to ensure the privacy and security of our correspondence?

I am poised to proceed with the online transfer as soon as these points are clarified. Ensuring that every step taken is transparent and well-documented is not only good practice but essential in fostering trust and cooperation among all parties involved.

Your attention to these matters and continued guidance is greatly appreciated. I look forward to your responses and to advancing to the next phase of our journey together.

Warm regards and best wishes,

<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Email #2, from Mary:

Dear Mr <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>


Thanks for your email and the content therein is well noted.
I write to inform you that the bank account of Mr Charles Sipes is still active 
. You can go ahead and wire the payment for the required documents in order
to get the fund release approval. All the documents regarding the fund will be send to you
once it's ready.

Furthermore, I want you to know that every one of our conversations has been encrypted and confidential.
no need to be worried about anything, just trust me that everything  will be fine  once the documents are obtained.

Be informed that with the power covered in lawyer Andre, it will not take him more than  48 hours to get the required documents secured
and sent to us which would enable the release of said funds into your nominated bank  account within 24hours.

Bank Name :First National Bank
Account No: 739260388
Routing No: 043318092
Account name: Charles Franklin Sipes
Address: 601 E Pitt St Bedford Pennsylvania 15522.

Thanks for your cooperation.


Best Regards.
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

Dear <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Thank you for your prompt and reassuring response. It's refreshing to engage with professionals who value efficiency and security as much as I do. Your clarification and confirmation of the ongoing process, as well as the active status of Mr. Charles Sipes' bank account, have helped put to rest any concerns I had. This heightened level of trust and transparency solidifies my confidence in proceeding forward with our collaboration.

I've taken note of the account details provided once again and will be initiating the wire transfer shortly. However, I hope you understand that in line with maintaining rigorous due diligence, I will be executing this transfer through a secure and monitored transaction service recommended by my bank for international transactions. This service not only ensures that funds are transferred securely but also allows for the tracking of the transaction, providing both sender and receiver with added peace of mind. I trust this meets our mutual interest in maintaining the utmost security and transparency throughout this process.

In anticipation of the documents that lawyer Andre is scheduled to secure within the next 48 hours, I find myself increasingly eager to review them and understand more deeply the intricacies of our joint venture. Your assurance that these documents will pave the way for the swift release of funds into the nominated account is most heartening.

Furthermore, recognizing the importance of secure communication, I appreciate your reassurance on the encryption of our conversations. For added security, and to preserve the integrity of our interactions, I too have taken steps to ensure that all our communications are routed through encrypted channels from my end. This should provide an additional layer of privacy and security for the sensitive nature of our discourse.

Lastly, I wish to express my gratitude for the professionalism and guidance you've provided thus far. The prospect of contributing to a venture with such promising outcomes is truly exciting. Rest assured, the wire transfer will be initiated as soon as I've finalized the arrangements with the transaction service to ensure everything is in order.

Please do keep me updated on the progress of the legal documentation, and I look forward to moving to the next phase of our agreement.

Warm regards and best wishes,

<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

Create a scam-baiting response to the most recent email, to keep the scammer in a false sense of security by posing as a potential victim.

Email #1, from Cameron (scam-baiter):

 Dear Ms. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Happy New Week to you as well! I hope this message finds you in good health and high spirits. It was a pleasant surprise to receive your email, and it’s indeed very nice to meet you too, albeit virtually. I’m deeply touched by your generosity and the noble cause you’re aiming to support. Stories like yours inspire hope and kindness in a world that often seems to need more of both.

Firstly, please allow me to express my condolences for the loss of your late husband, Mr. Richmond Richardson. It’s clear that his legacy of benevolence lives on through you, and I’m truly honored to be considered a part of this charitable endeavor you’re so passionately committed to.

The concept of dedicating a donation fund to a charity project is something very close to my heart. I’ve always believed in the power of giving back to the community and supporting those in need. Thus, your proposal resonates with me greatly, and I’m eager to learn more about how I can assist in making your vision a reality.

Regarding the receipt of the fund, I believe that a bank-to-bank transfer would be the most secure and straightforward method, ensuring that the funds are allocated accurately and efficiently for their intended purpose. However, I’m open to discussing the Visa Mastercard option should it prove to be more suitable for the project’s needs.

Before we proceed further, I would love to learn more about the specifics of the charity project you have in mind. Understanding the goals, the communities or causes that will benefit, and how the funds will be utilized will not only enable me to connect with the project on a deeper level but also ensure that we align on the vision and the outcomes we hope to achieve.

Additionally, should there be any documentation or verification process required to facilitate this donation, please let me know how I can assist in streamlining these procedures. Ensuring compliance and transparency is paramount, and I’m here to contribute to making this process as smooth and effective as possible.

Lastly, I’m humbled by the trust you’ve placed in me by offering 30% of the fund for my efforts. I’m curious to learn more about the organization that will be receiving the rest 70%—the work they do, their mission, and how we can maximally support their initiatives through this generous donation.

Ms. Richardson, thank you once again for reaching out with such a heartwarming proposal. I’m looking forward to hearing back from you with more details about the charity project and the next steps to bring our collaborative effort to fruition. Together, I believe we can make a significant impact.

I wish you all the best and await your response.

Warm regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Email #2, from Rosalyn:

Hello, my dear beloved one,
How are you doing today, Thanks for the message that you sent to me and I appreciate your honesty in receiving my fund and using it to help the Charity Organizations. God bless you for that, I am in the Nursing Home Hospital.
The amount that I deposited in my savings account is the sum of $650,000 USD. That is the fund I want to give out to you for the Charity donation. Because my doctor said my health is getting so bad now, like I have said you have nothing to worry about, just email my lawyer and proceed with him. He is a very nice and honest, God fearing Man. The nurse taking care of me in the nursing home helped me this morning.
So please email my lawyer. Tell him that you were sent by Ms. Rosalyn Richardson, for the process transfer of my fund to you to enable you to use it to help the organization in your country.
,
Name: HENRY JOROK.  
Email: <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>
Tel:   +(225)544706988
Mail. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>

Thanks and God bless you
Ms. Rosalyn Richardson

Dear Ms. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Thank you so much for your prompt reply. It’s heartening to know that despite the challenges you face, your spirit of giving and helping those in need remains undiminished. I want to extend my best wishes and hopes for comfort to you, especially knowing your current health situation. Your determination to make a positive impact, even in difficult times, is truly inspirational.

I have taken note of Mr. Henry Jorok's contact information and will be reaching out to him shortly to initiate the process for the fund transfer. It’s reassuring to know that he comes highly recommended by you and that I’ll be working with someone who shares our values of honesty and integrity.

Before I proceed with contacting Mr. Jorok, I would like to reiterate my keen interest in understanding more about the charity project's specifics. Learning about the objectives and the direct impact of the donation will greatly aid in planning how best to utilize the funds towards the causes we aim to support. Could you possibly share more details about the charity organizations or projects you have in mind? Knowing the scope and focus areas will allow for more strategic planning and implementation of the donation.

Furthermore, in preparation for the transfer and subsequent project planning, it would be beneficial to start compiling a report on potential organizations or initiatives that align with your vision. Once the fund is successfully transferred, we can hit the ground running and ensure that your generous donation starts making a difference as soon as possible.

Rest assured, I will maintain the utmost levels of transparency and diligence throughout this process. Your trust in me to carry out this mission is not something I take lightly. I’m committed to ensuring that every dollar is accounted for and used to create the most significant positive impact on the lives of those it intends to help.

I will also ensure to keep all our communications secure, and to start, I suggest we may consider using secure emailing services for any sensitive information regarding the transfer and the project’s details going forward. This is just a precautionary measure to safeguard your generous contribution and ensure it reaches those in need without any hitches.

Ms. Richardson, your vision of helping the less fortunate and supporting charity organizations is a noble cause, and I am fully committed to making it a reality in your honor. I’ll be in touch with Mr. Jorok to initiate the fund transfer process and will keep you updated on every step of the way.

Thank you once again for entrusting me with this responsibility. I wish you peace and comfort and hope that knowing your contribution will change lives, brings you joy.

Warm regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Email #1, from Cameron (scam-baiter):

Dear Sir <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Greetings and blessings to you. I hope this message finds you well and thriving in your invaluable efforts with the United Nations Covid 19 Palliative Program. Your dedication and that of your team’s continue to inspire and motivate me profoundly.

Upon receiving your latest directive, it dawned on me the importance of maintaining rigorous security and verification measures, especially in these times where digital platforms are often subjected to various forms of threats. It is indeed reassuring to see such vigilance on your part, ensuring that all procedures are thoroughly validated and secure.

Regarding the request for my identity card, please accept my sincere apologies for the oversight. The omission was unintended and arose from a deep engagement in organizing my resources and plans to maximize the effectiveness of the funds once received. I appreciate your patience and the gentle reminder to complete this crucial step.

Before I proceed with sending a scanned copy of my identification document, I seek your advice on a matter concerning data protection. Given the sensitive nature of personal identification documents, could you kindly confirm the secure means through which I should transmit this information to you and the accrediting bank? I am aware of various encrypted platforms that afford a higher level of security against potential digital interception. If there is a preferred platform or method from your end, please do guide me accordingly.

Furthermore, in preparation for the swift handling of the online bank transfer, I have taken the liberty to consult with a cybersecurity expert to ensure my systems are fortified against any unauthorized access. This, I believe, will guarantee that the transfer process is smooth, secure, and benefits the intended cause without any hitches.

To reiterate my previous commitments, I remain fully aligned with the guidelines and timeline of the program. My immediate action following your confirmation on the secure transmission method will be to provide the necessary identification document. This will be accompanied by a reaffirmation of my readiness to proceed to the next steps, as outlined in your guidance.

Your leadership and steadfast support in navigating these procedures are immensely valued. I look forward again to your prompt advice so we can collectively advance towards our shared goal of making a significant impact through the United Nations Covid 19 Palliative Program.

May our cooperative effort continue to be blessed and fruitful in alleviating the challenges faced by many during these trying times.

Thank you once again for your understanding and guidance. I await your esteemed response.

Yours in service and anticipation,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu 

Email #2, from Luis:


United Nation, Covid 19 Palliative Program,
Salacak, Üsküdar Harem Sahil Yolu
No:29, 34000 Üsküdar/İstanbul, Turkey.

Dear Beneficiary, Cameron,

We received your message, Mr. Cameron, I assure you of safety and secure of your Identity Card and your full Details, be rest assured that you are in a safe hand, and have nothing to worry about, your details, including your Identification is meant to be kept sacred and secured, So, worry not about the safety of your details, I assure you of safety. 

Attach your Identity Card and send it to us through this e-mail address, we will update your file,  and submit your Identity Card, to the accrediting Bank immediately we receive it, for the Online Transfer of your Fund to commence. 

I am looking forward to receive your Identity Card.

May God bless us all in our respective endeavors.

Thank you.

Yours Faithfully,
Sir. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Financial Adviser and Head of Repayment Program Unit
United Nation, Covid 19 Palliative Program,
Salacak, Üsküdar Harem Sahil Yolu
No:29, 34000 Üsküdar/İstanbul, Turkey.

Dear Sir <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Thank you for your swift and reassuring response. It is with a humble heart and an eager spirit that I approach this next step, bolstered by the assurance of security and the sanctity with which you and your esteemed organization treat personal information. Your words have imbued me with a renewed sense of confidence and trust in the process, as we navigate these crucial phases together.

In light of your guidance and the assurances provided, I am preparing the necessary documentation, including the identity card required to fulfill the compliance and verification measures of this noble program. Given the vital importance of maintaining the integrity and security of such sensitive information, I have taken additional steps to ensure that the copy of my identity card is clear, legible, and securely generated.

Before proceeding to send the document over email, as suggested, I consulted with my cybersecurity advisor to assess the best practices for securely transmitting sensitive information. Following this consultation, I have encrypted the document using a secure file encryption tool, which will ensure that the information remains protected throughout its digital transmission. I believe this added layer of security aligns with our mutual interest in safeguarding personal information against potential digital vulnerabilities.

Enclosed with this message, you will find the encrypted file containing the scanned copy of my identity card. To access the document, please use the following decryption key, which I’ve ensured is transmitted over this secure channel to maintain confidentiality:

**Decryption Key:** [Unique Decryption Key Placeholder]

Should there be any issues in accessing the document or if an alternate method of submission is preferred, I kindly ask for your guidance to facilitate a smooth and compliant process.

Furthermore, I am eager to learn more about the next steps following this submission. Understanding the timeline and any additional requirements will help me to adequately prepare and ensure that I remain aligned with the expectations and deadlines set forth by the United Nations Covid 19 Palliative Program.

I am wholeheartedly committed to contributing to the success of this program and to ensuring that the aid reaches those in need promptly and efficiently. Your leadership and the tireless efforts of your team are deeply appreciated, and I am honored to be a part of this global initiative.

May our collective efforts bring hope, relief, and tangible assistance to those impacted by the pandemic. I look forward to your confirmation of the received document and any further instructions.

Thank you once again for your unwavering support and guidance.

Warm regards and blessings,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Email #1, from Cameron (scam-baiter):

 Dear <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Thank you for your response, and I appreciate your patience and understanding. It seems there may have been a slight miscommunication, for which I apologize. My intention was not to convey a sense of indefinite delay but rather to highlight my commitment to diligently finalizing the necessary documentation with the utmost attention to detail and accuracy.

To address your concern directly, I am not merely compiling these documents in a casual manner; instead, I am ensuring that each piece of information provided will withstand scrutiny and fulfill the stringent requirements set forth. This includes verifying that my identification and other personal details are current, valid, and appropriately documented, to preempt any potential issues that could arise during verification by the bank or legal team.

Understanding now the urgency and the clear need for these specific details without further ado, I am hereby providing the requested information:

1. Phone Number: +1 (555) 012-3456
2. Address: 123 Main Street, Anytown, OH, USA 45678
3. Identification: [Please specify preferred ID format]

I hope this clears any doubts regarding my readiness and eagerness to proceed. My previous communications aimed to express thoroughness, albeit I recognize the possibility that this approach might have seemed like a hesitation or delay from your perspective.

Given these details, I hope we can swiftly move forward. However, I have a few additional queries to ensure everything is seamlessly coordinated on my end:

1. Direct Contact with Legal Team: Could you facilitate a direct line of communication with the legal department handling the Fund ownership certificate? This would allow me to directly address any outstanding concerns they might have and expedite the process.

2. Bank Protocols: You mentioned interaction protocols with the bank in Rome. Could you provide specific guidelines or points of contact at the bank for me to follow up with? This would be vital for synchronizing our efforts and ensuring that the documents and information provided meet all necessary criteria.

3. Estimated Time Frame: With the information now in your hands, could you offer an estimated timeline for the next steps? Knowing the expected turnaround time for obtaining the Fund ownership certificate would greatly assist in managing my schedule and expectations.

Isabel, your guidance has been instrumental throughout this process, and I genuinely value the prompt feedback and direction you’ve provided. I am committed to ensuring that no further delays impede our progress and am ready to take any additional steps required to facilitate a swift conclusion to this phase of the transaction.

I eagerly await your instructions on the aforementioned points and am prepared to act immediately upon receiving your guidance.

Warmest regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Email #2, from Isabel:

Dear Cameron McCaffrey
The   required id is driver license or international passport
With the information you provided so far we can proceed with the authentication and gazette
Let me know once Mr Patrick Marsh the auditor contacts you for validation .
It will be good to receive the id today for th4 necessary application
Get back asap

I need the id then i will give time frame
though its 5 days maximum because of applications and legal docs
once done with application we put you in contact with Mr Arturo
I dont want mistakes or excuses

Isabel Idris

Dear <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Thank you for your swift response, which I received with much appreciation. Understanding the urgency and the need for a streamlined process, I'm fully aligned with the timeline and the steps laid out in your communication. It’s heartening to see the progress we're making, and I'm eager to see the completion of this crucial phase.

Per your request for a form of identification to proceed with the authentication and gazette, I am currently finalizing the preparation of a high-resolution scan of my driver's license. I’m taking extra precautions to ensure that the document is clear and that all information is legible to prevent any possible delays in verification on your end. Rest assured, I share your sentiment about wanting to avoid any mistakes or excuses that could hinder our progress.

Given the importance of this document and our mutual interest in maintaining the highest levels of security, I'm opting to send the ID through a secure document transfer service. This will ensure that the document reaches you safely and is protected against unauthorized access. I'll include a password-protected layer for added security; the password will be communicated to you in a separate email to keep it confidential.

Before I proceed to send my identification today, as requested, I'd like to confirm the specific email address or secure portal where I should upload the scan of my driver's license. This would help me direct the document accurately and to the right hands without any risk of it being misplaced or sent to an unintended recipient.

Furthermore, the anticipation of Mr. Patrick Marsh's contact for the validation process has me prepared and looking forward to contributing to smoothing out any verification necessities. Your assurance of direct contact with Mr. Arturo following the application process fortifies my trust in the efficiency and coordination of your team.

Isabel, thank you once more for your clear guidance and for setting a definitive timeframe of 5 days maximum for the applications and legal documentation. It helps immensely with planning on my end, and I’m fully committed to keeping in step with each phase as we proceed.

I await your instruction on the secure transmission of my driver's license scan. Following that, I will immediately send the document to expedite our mutual goal of efficient and mistake-free progress.

Warmest regards with anticipations for our continued cooperation,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Create a scam-baiting response to the following email, to lure the scammer into a false sense of security by posing as a potential victim.

International Monetary Fund
( I.M.F ) Head Office
Senior Resident Representative
#1900 Pennsylvania Ave NW,
Washington, DC 20431 USA.
(I.M.F)(*2002*).
RESPOND TO OUR OFFICIAL EMAIL(He)

INSTRUCTION / WARNING TO RELEASE YOUR UNPAID FUND (*2002*).

This is to inform you of a very important information which will be of a great help to redeem you from all the ifficulties you have been experiencing in getting your long overdue payment, due to excessive demand for money from you by both orrupt Bank officials and Courier Companies after which your funds remain unpaid to you. I am Ms.Kristalina Georgieva, a highly placed official of the International Monetary Fund (IMF). It may interest you to know that reports have reached our office by so many correspondences on the uneasy way in which people like you are treated by Various Banks and Courier Companies/ Diplomat across Europe to Africa and Asia /London Uk. We have decided to put a stop to that.



All Governmental and Non-Governmental prostates, NGOs, Finance Companies, Banks, Security Companies and Courier companies which have been in contact with you of late have been instructed to back off from your transaction and you have been advised NOT to respond to them anymore since the International Monetary Fund (IMF) is now directly in charge of your payment.

Your name appeared in our payment schedule list of beneficiaries that will receive their funds in this first quarter payment of the year because we only transfer funds twice in a year according to our banking regulation. We apologize for the delay of your payment and please stop communicating with any office now and pay attention to our office payment accordingly.


Now your new Payment,
United Nation Approval No; UN5685P,
White House Approved No: WH44CV,
Reference No.-35460021,
Allocation No: 674632
Password No: 339331,
Pin Code No: 55674 and your
Certificate of Merit Payment No: 103,
Released Code No: 0763;
Immediate (IMF) Telex confirmation No: -1114433;
Secret Code No: XXTN013.

Your payment inheritance fund is USD$10.7Million. Having received these vital payment numbers, therefore you are qualified now to receive and confirm your payment with the International Monetary Fund (IMF) immediately. We assure you that your payment will get to you as long as you follow my directives and instructions. We have decided to give you a CODE, THE CODE IS: (*2002*).Please, any time you receive an email with the name Ms. Kristalina Georgieva, check if there is CODE (*2002*).if the code is not written, please delete the message from your box! You are hereby advised NOT to remit further payment to any institutions with respect to your transaction as your fund will be transferred to you directly from our source. I hope this is clear. Any action contrary to this instruction is at your own risk. Respond to this e-mail on: (<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS> ) with immediate effect and we shall give you further details on how your fund will be released.

This Office hereby gives you the GUARANTEE your absolute protection and that of your approved Compensation Funds via Bank to Bank Wire is 100% assured. Your approved amount of US$10,700,000.00. (Ten Million,Seven Hundred Thousand United States Dollars) by the IMF must reach you in any of the above options best for your reception and please do not respond to any email except this so you will be able to receive your fund from the right source which is this office that you have already contacted me.

Ms.Kristalina Georgieva
Managing Director of the International
Monetary Fund. (I.M.F)(*2002*).
RESPOND TO OUR OFFICIAL EMAIL:(<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS> )

Dear Ms. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

First and foremost, allow me to express my deepest gratitude for reaching out to me with such vital information. Your message arrived in my inbox like a beacon of hope amidst the sea of confusion and setbacks I've faced trying to claim what is rightfully mine.
